validation.summary: Lifecycle ownership test file parses successfully.
8 tests run, 0 passed, 8 failed; failures map to missing T023/T024 lifecycle behavior and output contracts.

controllerChecks: Tests cover verified-owned stop and stopped evidence.
Tests cover probable-owned, unknown, and external refusal without stopping non-verified processes.
Tests cover force-stop preserving the verified ownership gate.
Tests cover restart stop-wait-start transaction evidence.
Tests cover port_release_timeout and stop_failed persistence/events.
No product code was modified by the test task.
No inline node -e long-running fixture was introduced; tests use generated fixture scripts.
Leader process scan found no lifecycle test fixture processes left after the RED run.
acceptedResidualRisks: The RED suite depends on T023/T024 changing current legacy stop/restart payloads and force-stop routing.
The stop_failed fixture intentionally requires a future non-forceful stop path before force escalation can be represented.
followUpWork: T023 implement ownership-gated lifecycle actions in src/control-plane/actions.js, src/control-plane/runs.js, and src/runtime.js.
T024 wire lifecycle CLI commands and refusal next actions.
